missions.name: The Safehouse Hand
missions.briefing: Friend — got a private safehouse on a rock that just flipped on me. Viroids in the vault, ledger inside the viroids. Standard hand: descend, clear the floor, walk out with what belongs to me. House rule still applies: lose your shuttle, you lose the cargo with it. Ante up clean and the doubled lane is yours on the close. — Maverick

missions.name: The Table Wants a Tell
missions.briefing: Friend, I have a buyer asking what the rock is really holding. Not what the brochure says. Sit at the terminal, read a few tells with the SCI gun, then bring back the sample the table calls for. Clean read, clean hand. — Maverick
